basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Nurse – II Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course, B.Sc. (Nursing) / M.Sc. (Nursing), Experience in working in projects / programs at state or district level, Work experience in field level (community)
qualification.details: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course. Good Command on Tamil & English – Speaking, Reading & Writing. Experience in working in projects / programs at state or district level. Work experience in field level (community).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Nurse – II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Nurse – II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER Project Nurse – II recruitment is 09-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse – II post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Nurse – II position in the JIPMER recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course, or a B.Sc. (Nursing) / M.Sc. (Nursing) degree. Good command over Tamil and English is also essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse – II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse – II post is 30 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse – II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 24000 Per Month, which includes a basic pay of Rs.20,000/- and Rs.4000/- (20% HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for JIPMER Project Nurse – II?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Nurse – II post will involve a written test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Does JIPMER offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While the notification specifies a maximum age limit of 30 years, age relaxation for reserved categories is typically provided as per government rules. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specifics.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for the Project Nurse – II post?
faq.answer: Candidates are expected to have experience in working in projects/programs at the state or district level, and also possess work experience in a field-level (community) setting.
